name: Grand Alliance Order: Protectors
inspire: Immediately after an Action step, if a friendly fighter began that Action step in friendly territory and made a successful Attack, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Deny Trespassers
reactions.rulesText: Friendly fighters cannot be Flanked or Surrounded while they are in friendly territory.

abilities.name: Righteous Fury
abilities.flavorText: Mortals seldom fight more ferociously than in defence of what is theirs by right.
abilities.rulesText: Immediately after making an Attack roll for a melee Attack made by a friendly fighter in friendly territory, you can re-roll 1 Attack dice in that Attack roll. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: Active Defence
abilities.flavorText: It is important that defenders do not revert to static warfare, but instead constantly harry and outmanoeuvre their foes.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter in friendly territory. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end in friendly territory. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Secret Pathway
abilities.flavorText: The canny defender has the advantage in a pitched battle, for they know the terrain and its secret pathways.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter on a feature token in friendly territory. Remove that fighter from the battlefield and place them on another feature token in friendly territory, then give that fighter a Move token. This ability can only be used once per game.
